Part.Source:
//RELATORIO CONTAS A RECEBER - Henrique LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context)
Do 'LoadGridState'
&Title = "Duplicatas a Receber"
Header if &Context.EmpCod.IsEmpty() LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Endif
for Each Order EmpCod, FilCod Where EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod Where FilCod = &Context.FilCod &AppName = FilFan &Phone = FilFonNum &Mail = FilEml &Website = FilSit &AddressLine1 = FilLogNro &AddressLine2 = FilBai &AddressLine3 = FilCidNom +', '+ FilCidUfeCod Print printTitle EndFor
End
//Footer // &PageInfo = "Page: " + &Page.ToString().Trim() // &DateInfo = "Date: " + &Today.ToFormattedString() // Print printFooter //End
Do 'PrintFilters' Do 'PrintColumnTitles' Do 'PrintData' Do 'PrintFooter'
Sub 'PrintFilters'
If not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreCliCod EndIf If not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreCliRaz EndIf if not &CreVlrDup.IsEmpty() print PrintBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf If not &CreIsPer.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreIsPer EndIf If not &CreFilPgt.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreFilPgt EndIf If not &CreDtaVct.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreDtaVct EndIf If not &CreDtaVct_To.IsEmpty() &CreDtaVct_To_Description = format('%1 (%2)', "Vct.", "à") print printBlockFilterCreDtaVct_To EndIf If not &CreRecPag.IsEmpty() &FilterCreRecPagValueDescription = &CreRecPag.EnumerationDescription() print printBlockFilterCreRecPag EndIf If not &CreSts.IsEmpty() &FilterCreStsValueDescription = &CreSts.EnumerationDescription() print printBlockFilterCreSts EndIf If not &CreVlrSdo.IsEmpty() print printBlockFilterCreVlrSdo EndIf If not &CreFrpPgtoTip.IsEmpty() &FilterCreTipDupValueDescription = &CreFrpPgtoTip.EnumerationDescription()
print printBlockFilterCreTipDup EndIf If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro1.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro1 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom1.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom1 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVenCod1.IsEmpty() &CreVenCod = &CreVenCod1 print printBlockFilterCreVenCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup1.IsEmpty() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 0 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 1 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator1 = 2 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", ">") EndCase &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup1 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro2.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro2 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom2.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom2 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVenCod2.IsEmpty() &CreVenCod = &CreVenCod2 print printBlockFilterCreVenCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup2.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup2.IsEmpty() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 0 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 1 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator2 = 2 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", ">") EndCase &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup2 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 3 &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREDUPNRO' &CreDupNro3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreDupNro3.IsEmpty() &CreDupNro = &CreDupNro3 print printBlockFilterCreDupNro EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRNOM' &CreCbrNom3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreCbrNom3.IsEmpty() &CreCbrNom = &CreCbrNom3 print printBlockFilterCreCbrNom EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVENCOD' &CreVenCod3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVenCod3.IsEmpty() &CreVenCod = &CreVenCod3 print printBlockFilterCreVenCod EndIf Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREVLRDUP' &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Operator &CreVlrDup3.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) If not &CreVlrDup3.IsEmpty() Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 0 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "<") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 1 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", "=") Case &DynamicFiltersOperator3 = 2 &FilterCreVlrDupDescription = format('%1 (%2)', "Valor", ">") EndCase &CreVlrDup = &CreVlrDup3 print printBlockFilterCreVlrDup EndIf EndCase EndIf EndIf EndIf
EndSub
Sub 'PrintColumnTitles'
print printBlockBeforeGrid print printBlockLines_titles
EndSub
Sub 'PrintData'
&TotalSaldo.SetEmpty()
For each order EmpCod CreRecPag FilCod CreDtaVct when &OrderedBy = 1 order EmpCod CreRecPag FilCod (CreDtaVct) when &OrderedBy = 2 order EmpCod CreRecPag FilCod CreDupNro when &OrderedBy = 3 order EmpCod CreRecPag FilCod CreCliCod when &OrderedBy = 4
using DSwwDuplicataReceber(&CreCliCod, &CreCliRaz, &CreIsPer, &CreSts, &CreRecPag, &CreVlrSdo, &CreFrpPgtoTip, &CreFilPgt, &CreDtaVct, &CreDtaVct_To, &DynamicFiltersSelector1, &DynamicFiltersOperator1 , &CreDupNro1, &CreCbrCod1, &CreCbrNom1, &CreVenCod1, &CreBloNro1, &CreVlrDup1, &CreFrpPgtoTip1, &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 , &DynamicFiltersSelector2, &DynamicFiltersOperator2, &CreDupNro2,&CreCbrCod2, &CreCbrNom2, &CreVenCod2, &CreBloNro2 , &CreVlrDup2, &CreFrpPgtoTip2, &DynamicFiltersEnabled3, &DynamicFiltersSelector3, &DynamicFiltersOperator3, &CreDupNro3, &CreCbrCod3, &CreCbrNom3 , &CreVenCod3, &CreBloNro3, &CreVlrDup3, &CreFrpPgtoTip3)
if CreNovCliRaz_Formula.Length() > 30 &CreNovCliRaz = substr(CreNovCliRaz_Formula, 1, 30) + '...' Else &CreNovCliRaz = CreNovCliRaz_Formula EndIf &AuxPedido = CreAbvDup
&TotalSaldo += CreVlrSdo Do 'BeforePrintLine' print printBlockLines_data Do 'AfterPrintLine' EndFor
print Total
EndSub
Sub 'LoadGridState'
If &Session.Get(!"wwDuplicataReceberGridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(!"wwDuplicataReceberGridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(!"wwDuplicataReceberGridState")) Endif
&OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy
For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREISPER" &CreIsPer.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREFILPGT" &CreFilPgt.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREDTAVCT" &CreDtaVct.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &CreDtaVct_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERECPAG" &CreRecPag.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRSDO" &CreVlrSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREFRPPGTOTIP" &CreFrpPgtoTip.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CREVLRDUP" &CreVlrDup.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor
EndSub
Sub 'BeforePrintLine'
EndSub
Sub 'AfterPrintLine'
EndSub
Sub 'PrintFooter'
EndSub
